H2: SECTION09: SERVICE-LOCATIONS  
DONT-READ  
1=PRIVATE-GP(SCREEN-FOR-LIFE)  
2=PRIVATE-GP(NON-SCREEN-FOR-LIFE)  
3=POLYCLINIC  
4=SPECIALIST-OUTPATIENT(PUB-HOSP)  
5=SPECIALIST-OUTPATIENT(PRIV-HOSP)  
6=WORKPLACE  
7=COMMUNITY-VENUE  
8=OVERSEAS-CLINIC/HOSP  
9=ARMY-CAMP  
10=OTHER→SPECIFY________  
777=REFUSED  
888=DK  
END-SECTION09→SECTION10  

H1: SECTION10: HEALTH-CONDITIONS  

Q10040: WEIGHT-CHECK≥1 IN-PAST-12M? 1=YES; 2=NO; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  

Q10011: TOLD-LOSE-WEIGHT BY WESTERN-DR IN-PAST-12M?  
  1=YES [GOTO Q10041]; 2=NO [GOTO Q10020]; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  

Q10041: AFTER-LOSS-ADVICE ATTEMPT-LOSE-WEIGHT? 1=YES; 2=NO; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10020]  

Q10020: LOW-BACK-PAIN≥1DAY IN-PAST-30D?  
  1=YES [GOTO Q10021]; 2=NO [GOTO Q10025]; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  

Q10021: DAYS-LOW-BACK-PAIN IN-PAST-30D? (NUMBER) 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10022]  

Q10022: ACTIVITY-LIMITATION DUE-LOW-BACK-PAIN?  
  1=YES [GOTO Q10023]; 2=NO [GOTO Q10023]; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  

Q10023: LOW-BACK-PAIN CAUSED-BY-WORK?  
  1=YES; 2=NO; 3=NOT-APPLICABLE; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10024]  

Q10024: MED-LEAVE DAYS DUE-LOW-BACK-PAIN IN-PAST-12M? (NUMBER) 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10025]  

Q10025: NECK-Pain≥1DAY IN-PAST-30D?  
  1=YES [GOTO Q10026]; 2=NO [GOTO Q10030]; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  

Q10026: DAYS-NECK-Pain IN-PAST-30D? (NUMBER) 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10027]  

Q10027: ACTIVITY-LIMITATION DUE-NECK-Pain?  
  1=YES [GOTO Q10028]; 2=NO [GOTO Q10028]; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  

Q10028: NECK-Pain CAUSED-BY-WORK?  
  1=YES; 2=NO; 3=NOT-APPLICABLE; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10029]  

Q10029: MED-LEAVE DAYS DUE-NECK-Pain IN-PAST-12M? (NUMBER) 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10030]  

Q10030: WEAR GLASSES/CONTACT-LENSES?  
  1=YES [GOTO Q10031]; 2=NO [GOTO Q10032]; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  

Q10031: REASON-WEAR GLASSES/CONTACT? (MA)  
  1=MYOPIA; 2=PRESBYOPIA; 3=ASTIGMATISM; 4=OTHER→SPECIFY________; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10032]  

Q10032a: CATARACT? 1=YES; 2=NO; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  
Q10032b: GLAUCOMA? 1=YES; 2=NO; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  
Q10032c: AGE-RELATED MACULAR-DEGENERATION? 1=YES; 2=NO; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  
Q10032d: DIABETIC EYE-DISEASE? 1=YES; 2=NO; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10033]  

Q10033: FEEL-HEARING-LOSS?  
  1=YES [GOTO Q10034]; 2=NO [GOTO Q10035]; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  

Q10034: HEARING-LOSS CAUSED-BY-WORK? 1=YES; 2=NO; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10035]  

Q10035: DIFFICULTY FOLLOW-CONVERSATION IN-BACKGROUND-NOISE? 1=YES; 2=NO; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK [GOTO Q10036]  

Q10036: WEAR HEARING-AID? 1=YES; 2=NO; 777=REFUSED; 888=DK  
END-SECTION10→SECTION11
